ordinanceLabel: Alturas Municipal Code | Ord. 221-J (local amendments) | 2025 CBSC in effect
fireAgencyNote: CAL FIRE LMU covers surrounding Modoc County SRA
airDistrict: Northern Sierra Air Quality Management District (NSCAQMD)
muniCodeScrapeNote: JS-rendered SPA — WebFetch returns init scripts only. Human must access Municode manually.
fhszNote: City is on valley floor LRA — no SRA FHSZ designation. CAL FIRE map confirmation pending (403 during recon).
cityVsCountyPermits: City of Alturas relies on Modoc County Building and Safety for all building permit processing. No standalone city building dept.
